testcase.name: f

failure.message: class com.test.Test_ninjatutorial (in unnamed module @0x3d012ddd) cannot access class jdk.internal.org.jline.utils.Log (in module jdk.internal.le) because module jdk.internal.le does not export jdk.internal.org.jline.utils to unnamed module @0x3d012ddd
